headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://assets.calendly.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://assets.calendly.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://*.ytimg.com; connect-src 'self' https://formspree.io https://*.calendly.com; frame-src https://calendly.com https://*.calendly.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com; form-action 'self' https://formspree.io; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
